title: Hand of Straights
input_format: An integer array `hand` where `hand[i]` is the value written on the `ith` card and an integer `groupSize`.
output_format: `true` if you can rearrange the cards such that each group is of size `groupSize`, and consists of `groupSize` consecutive cards.
function_signature: function isNStraightHand(hand: number[], groupSize: number): boolean {}
